title: Login Issue
description: Customer cannot log into the account using correct credentials.

title: Payment Failed
description: Customer reported that payment failed during checkout.

title: Password Reset
description: Customer requested help resetting the account password.

title: Order Not Received
description: Customer has not received the order after 10 days.

title: Account Verification
description: Customer unable to verify email address.

title: Refund Request
description: Customer requested refund for a cancelled order.

title: App Crash
description: Mobile app crashes when opening settings.

title: Profile Update Issue
description: Customer unable to update profile information.

title: Email Notifications
description: Customer not receiving order confirmation emails.

title: Shipping Delay
description: Customer reported delay in shipping update.

title: Two Factor Authentication
description: Customer unable to receive verification code.

title: Billing Address Update
description: Customer requested help updating billing address.

title: Subscription Cancel
description: Customer wants to cancel monthly subscription.
